requirement_topic.en: Top Runner Energy Efficiency — Air Conditioners and Applicable Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: 领跑者能效——空调器及适用热泵
requirement_topic.zht: 領跑者能效——空調器及適用熱泵

summary.en: Japan's Energy Conservation Act uses the Top Runner Program for designated energy-consuming equipment. Air conditioners are an adopted Top Runner category, and applicable heat-pump products sold as air conditioners must meet target standard values, measurement methods, labelling, and reporting obligations set by METI / ANRE. Compliance analysis must identify the exact product class, cooling/heating capacity range, APF or applicable performance metric, and Japanese calculation conditions.
summary.zh: 日本《节能法》通过领跑者制度管理指定耗能设备。空调器属于已采用领跑者制度的品类，作为空调销售的适用热泵产品必须满足METI / 资源能源厅规定的目标基准值、测量方法、标签和报告义务。合规分析须识别具体产品类别、制冷/制热能力范围、APF或适用性能指标，以及日本计算条件。
summary.zht: 日本《節能法》通過領跑者制度管理指定耗能設備。空調器屬於已採用領跑者制度的品類，作為空調銷售的適用熱泵產品必須滿足METI / 資源能源廳規定的目標基準值、測量方法、標籤和報告義務。合規分析須識別具體產品類別、製冷/制熱能力範圍、APF或適用性能指標，以及日本計算條件。

standards_or_laws: Act on Rationalizing Energy Use and Shifting to Non-fossil Energy (Energy Conservation Act)
Top Runner Program for air conditioners
METI / Agency for Natural Resources and Energy energy efficiency rules

summary.en: China uses mandatory energy efficiency standards and the China Energy Label scheme for room air conditioners and heat-pump products, including GB 21455 for room air conditioners. Chinese seasonal or rated efficiency data are not automatically equivalent to Japan's Top Runner classification, APF calculation, or labelling requirements.
summary.zh: 中国对房间空调器和热泵产品采用强制性能效标准及中国能效标识制度，包括房间空调器适用的GB 21455。中国季节性或额定能效数据不能自动等同于日本领跑者分类、APF计算或标签要求。
summary.zht: 中國對房間空調器和熱泵產品採用強制性能效標準及中國能效標識制度，包括房間空調器適用的GB 21455。中國季節性或額定能效數據不能自動等同於日本領跑者分類、APF計算或標籤要求。

gap.en: Japan Top Runner is mandatory where the product falls within an adopted category such as air conditioners. Chinese GB 21455 data should be treated as a starting point only; exporters need Japan-specific classification, test data, APF or applicable efficiency calculation, Japanese label content, and importer reporting support.
gap.zh: 产品属于空调器等已采用领跑者制度的品类时，日本领跑者要求为强制性。中国GB 21455数据仅可作为起点；出口商需要日本特定分类、测试数据、APF或适用能效计算、日文标签内容及进口商报告支持。
gap.zht: 產品屬於空調器等已採用領跑者制度的品類時，日本領跑者要求為強制性。中國GB 21455數據僅可作為起點；出口商需要日本特定分類、測試數據、APF或適用能效計算、日文標籤內容及進口商報告支持。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for adopted Top Runner categories, including applicable air conditioners and heat-pump products sold in those categories
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for applicable Chinese energy efficiency categories; method not equivalent to Japan Top Runner

source.publisher: e-Gov Law Search / Government of Japan (Energy Conservation Act)

compliance_verdict.en: Major gap — Top Runner is mandatory for applicable air conditioner / heat-pump categories; Chinese energy-label data must be reclassified and recalculated under Japan's METI / ANRE method.
compliance_verdict.zh: 重大差距——适用空调器/热泵品类须满足领跑者要求；中国能效标识数据必须按日本METI / 资源能源厅方法重新分类和计算。
compliance_verdict.zht: 重大差距——適用空調器/熱泵品類須滿足領跑者要求；中國能效標識數據必須按日本METI / 資源能源廳方法重新分類和計算。
